steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states a general principle (sleek vehicles are more aerodynamic) and then introduces the A320 jet. The transition word must signal that the A320 is a concrete example of that principle.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'For example': explicitly marks the A320 as an instance of the general principle just stated. ✓
  • Choice B: signals adding a new point, not giving an example. ✗
  • Choice C: suggests two things happening at the same time, not an example relationship. ✗
  • Choice D: signals contrast, which contradicts the intended relationship. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
